creator: alex@hugo.bmg.gv.at
text:
net/bird upgrade to version 1.3.0

Fix: diff -rcu bird.old/Makefile bird/Makefile
--- bird.old/Makefile   2010-12-27 21:27:11.000000000 +0100
+++ bird/Makefile       2011-04-12 16:32:47.580915153 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      bird
-PORTVERSION=   1.2.5
+PORTVERSION=   1.3.0
 CATEGORIES=    net
 MASTER_SITES=  ftp://bird.network.cz/pub/bird/

diff -rcu bird.old/distinfo bird/distinfo
--- bird.old/distinfo   2010-12-27 21:27:11.000000000 +0100
+++ bird/distinfo       2011-04-12 16:32:51.930955864 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (bird-1.2.5.tar.gz) = f3e2f5f4474e9e869acc48ad1669bf44b37afd80b7348dd51d08daeb299b2368
-SIZE (bird-1.2.5.tar.gz) = 703750
+SHA256 (bird-1.3.0.tar.gz) = ff90e3ee115a83e2b03a57095132923f66e1fca874dcca7a908075b6c2dc84b3
+SIZE (bird-1.3.0.tar.gz) = 735100


Patch attached with submission follows:
